name: Paladin
abilities:
2☼: Give +1☼ to an ally hero's roll. Lose 1 life.

3☼: Draw an extra card.

Only Lose -3 life if 2 or less spaces away from the monster in line of sight.

Regain 2 life if you end your turn next to an ally.

Does +1 to minions.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card

4◆: Gain ֍ Bonus

5◆: 6☼: Move next to an ally hero who is alive. Lose 2 life.

7◆: Gain ☼ Bonus
7◆: Allies 1 space away get +2 to any roll.

name: Barbarian
abilities:
4☼: During your next movement, kill all minions who would be in range for combat while moving

Only Lose -3 life if 2 or less spaces away from the monster in line of sight.

If caught by a monster in a building, lose -2 life and escape the building.

Defeating a minion restores +2 life.

Does +2 to minions and Minions do -1 to hero.

4◆: Gain ֍ Bonus

5◆: 3☼: Move all minions that are 6+X☼ spaces away next to you. Engage combat. use any extra ☼ for X.

7◆: Gain ☼ Bonus

name: Hunter
abilities:
3☼: Summon your pet. Can only have 1 summoned at a time.

2☼: Pet performs an action.

Pet can fly over obstacles(not walls).
Movement rolls are shared between the pet and hero. NOT bonus Dice.

Pet dies in any combat with monster.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card

4◆: Gain ֍ Bonus

5◆: 6☼: Summon a second pet.

7◆: Gain ☼ Bonus

name: Scout
abilities:
1☼: Increase movement roll by 2.

5֍: Perform an action.

Only lose -3 life if 7 or more spaces away from the monster in line of sight.



Roll a 4 with ☼ to avoid death when caught by a monster in a building.

name: Wizard
abilities:
2☼: Reroll any dice this turn.

4☼: Draw an extra card

May discard a card to draw another card.

Has -2 to every roll in combat. Always goes second in combat.

3◇: Relocate 1 door

5◆: 6☼: Trade places with any object.

name: Druid
abilities:
3☼: Transform. Persists until cast again. Can be used multiple times per turn.

4☼: Transform an ally for this turn.

TURTLE: +3☼ and -4֍
CHEETAH: +4֍ and -3☼
BEAR: +2 in combat roll. take -1 from minions.
DEER: Restore +2 life to any hero for 1☼, Takes +4 from attacks while in this form.

Has -3 to all combat and escape rolls. Always goes second in combat.

name: Cleric
abilities:
12☼: Revive any hero to half health. End both heroes turns.

4☼: Restore +3 life to any living hero.

Both Dice count towards actions OR Movements. Excludes Bonus Dice. Can only use 1 dice for combat and escaping.


Has -4 to all combat and escape rolls. Always goes second in combat.
